message:
fix(scheduler): Cx guard drop ordering, IO driver double-lock, Parker waiting order

- three_lane: move _cx_guard creation before TaskExecutionGuard so
  during panic unwind the guard's drop runs while Cx is still installed,
  matching the correct ordering in worker.rs
- three_lane: replace is_empty() + try_lock() with single try_lock()
  on IO driver to eliminate double mutex acquisition on every idle loop
  iteration when sockets are registered
- worker: move waiting.fetch_add before lock_unpoisoned in Parker::park()
  to match park_timeout() ordering, preventing a fragile lost-wakeup
  invariant if the notified re-check is ever refactored

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
